user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new posting source approver, so that job postings are approved before they go live
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Posting Source Approvers screen; When I click Add new posting source approver and set the posting mode, employee class, location and approver(s); Then the approver rule is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit a posting source approver rule, so that I can keep approvers current
acceptance_criteria: Given a posting source approver rule is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated rule is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view posting source approvers with their posting mode, employee class and location, so that I can review the approval matrix
acceptance_criteria: Given approver rules exist; When I open the list; Then each rule shows Posting mode, Employee class(es), Location(s) and Approver(s)
